parameters.query:
SELECT
  ma.member_agreement_id,
  ma.member_id,
  ma.facilitator_id,
  ma.agreement_template_id,
  ma.member_email_id,
  at.documenso_template_envelope_id,
  at.documenso_member_recipient_id,
  at.documenso_facilitator_recipient_id,
  m.first_name AS member_first_name,
  m.last_name  AS member_last_name,
  COALESCE(me_used.email, me_primary.email, m.email) AS member_email,
  COALESCE(me_used.member_email_id, me_primary.member_email_id) AS resolved_member_email_id,
  f.first_name AS facilitator_first_name,
  f.last_name  AS facilitator_last_name,
  COALESCE(fe_primary.email, f.email) AS facilitator_email,
  fe_primary.member_email_id AS resolved_facilitator_email_id
FROM member_agreements ma
JOIN agreement_templates at ON at.agreement_template_id = ma.agreement_template_id
JOIN members m ON m.member_id = ma.member_id
JOIN members f ON f.member_id = ma.facilitator_id
LEFT JOIN member_emails me_used
  ON me_used.member_email_id = ma.member_email_id
 AND COALESCE(me_used.status, 'active') = 'active'
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT member_email_id, email
  FROM member_emails
  WHERE member_id = m.member_id
    AND COALESCE(status, 'active') = 'active'
  ORDER BY is_verified DESC, is_primary DESC, created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
) me_primary ON true
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT member_email_id, email
  FROM member_emails
  WHERE member_id = f.member_id
    AND COALESCE(status, 'active') = 'active'
  ORDER BY is_verified DESC, is_primary DESC, created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
) fe_primary ON true
WHERE ma.member_agreement_id = $1::uuid
LIMIT 1;

UPDATE member_agreements
SET
  signature_method = 'documenso',
  status = 'pending_signature',
  documenso_document_id = $2,
  documenso_external_id = $3,
  member_email_id = COALESCE(NULLIF($4, '')::uuid, member_email_id),
  updated_at = now()
WHERE member_agreement_id = $1::uuid;
